Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A unity feedback system has the forward path transfer function

 
The input r(t) = 1 + 6t is applied to the system. The minimum value of k1 if the steady-state error is to be less than 0.1 is ________. (Rounded upto to nearest integer value)
NAT
Correct answer: 60
Solution

60 (60 - 60)

Q15 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A feedback system has an open-loop transfer function,

NAT
Correct answer: 7.5
Solution

7.5 (7.2 - 7.7)

 
Q16 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A control system is designed to keep the antenna of a tracking radar pointed at a flying target.
The system must be able to follow a target travelling in a straight line with a speed of 300 m/s with maximum permissible error 0.02 degree. The shortest distance from the antenna to the target is 350 m. The value of error constant in order to satisfy the requirements is _________.
(Rounded upto 2 decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 2028.27
Solution

2028.27 (2027.25 - 2029.32)
